assignments.name: CRT_Set_Valentin_Vasquez_as_an_owner
assignments.label: CRT - Set Valentin Vasquez as an owner

rules.name: TrueAssignRecipientRequester
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 9 AND 10 AND ((4 AND 5 AND 6) OR (7 AND 8))
rules.label: True Assign Recipient/Requester

decisions.description: MIS-1639 check if the record type is ddq and populates the recipient email by user or by request email custom metadata type
decisions.name: Is_DDQ
decisions.label: Is DDQ

decisions.name: New_Search_Intelligence_Deal_Support_not_Submitted
decisions.label: New Search Intelligence Deal Support not Submitted

decisions.name: Rule_ABDL_Approve_by_BizOps_DDQ_or_Legal
decisions.label: *Rule (ABDL)* - Approve by BizOps - DDQ or Legal

decisions.description: If record type is ASR and Status is changed and Status = Closed Won/ Completed / Initiated - Future deliveries remaining - execute 'ASR = Closed Won, Completed, Initiated' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_ASC_ASR_Request_moved_to_Closed_Won_Completed_Initiated
decisions.label: *Rule (ASC)* - ASR Request moved to Closed Won, Completed, Initiated

decisions.description: If record type is ASR and Status is changed and Status = Closed Won/ Completed / Initiated - Future deliveries remaining - execute 'ASR = Closed Won, Completed, Initiated' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_ASSC_AS_Request_Status_Changed
decisions.label: *Rule (ASSC)* - AS Request Status Changed

decisions.description: Check if the Record type is Sales Intelligence Deal Support to assign Valentin Vasquez as an owner MIS-3015
decisions.name: Rule_CRT_Check_record_type
decisions.label: *Rule(CRT)* - Check record type

decisions.description: If record type is CSA and 'Request Type' = Growth/ Standard/ Premium and record is new or 'Status' is changed and 'Status' = Completed - execute '(CSA) Status = Completed' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_CSAC_CSA_Status_Completed
decisions.label: *Rule (CSAC)* - (CSA) Status = Completed

rules.name: CSA_Status_Completed
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4) AND (5 OR 6) AND 7
rules.label: (CSA) Status = Completed

decisions.description: If record type is CSA/CSS and 'Request Type' = Growth/ Standard/ Premium and record is new or 'Status' is changed and 'Status' = In Process - execute '(CSA) Status = In Process' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_CSAIP_CSA_CSS_Status_In_Process
decisions.label: *Rule (CSAIP)* - (CSA/CSS) Status = In Process

rules.name: CSA_Status_In_Process
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 8) AND (2 OR 3 OR 4) AND (5 OR 6) AND 7
rules.label: (CSA) Status = In Process

decisions.description: If Status = Pending Requestor - execute 'Status = Pending Requestor' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_DDC_Set_Date_Delivered_to_Customer
decisions.label: *Rule (DDC)* - Set "Date Delivered to Customer"

decisions.description: If record type is Legal and Status is changed and Status = Pending Action - execute 'Legal - Pending Action' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_LPA_Legal_Pending_Action
decisions.label: *Rule (LPA)* - Legal - Pending Action

decisions.description: If the record type is Legal and Quote is not blank and record is new or Quote is changed - execute 'Populate Quote Owner Email' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_LQE_Legal_Quote_Owner_Email
decisions.label: *Rule (LQE)* - Legal - Quote Owner Email

decisions.description: If record type is Legal and Status is changed and Status = Cancelled and Quote is not blank - execute 'Legal Request Cancelled' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_LRC_Legal_Request_Cancelled
decisions.label: *Rule (LRC)* - Legal Request Cancelled

decisions.description: If record is new and record type is Billing Form - execute 'NEW Billing Forms' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_NBF_NEW_Billing_Forms
decisions.label: *Rule (NBF)* - NEW Billing Forms

decisions.description: If record is new and record type is Quote request - execute 'New Quote Request' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_NQR_New_Quote_Request
decisions.label: *Rule (NQR)* - New Quote Request

decisions.description: If record type is Onboarding Request and 'Request Type' contains onbprading and record is new or 'Status' is changed and 'Status' = Completed MIS-4200
decisions.name: Rule_Onboarding_Request_Onboarding_Request_Status_Completed
decisions.label: *Rule (Onboarding Request)* - (Onboarding_Request) Status = Completed

rules.name: Onboarding_Request_Status_Completed
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4) AND (5 OR 6) AND 7
rules.label: (Onboarding Request) Status = Completed

decisions.description: If record type is Onboarding Request and 'Request Type' contians is onboarding and record is new or 'Status' is changed and 'Status' = In Process MIS-4200
decisions.name: Rule_Onboarding_request_Onboarding_Request_Status_In_Process
decisions.label: *Rule (Onboarding request)* - (Onboarding_Request) Status = In Process

rules.name: Onboarding_request_in_progress
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4) AND (5 OR 6) AND 7
rules.label: Onboarding request in progress

decisions.description: If record is new or related Opportunity is changed and Opportunity is not blank - execute 'Opportunity is set' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_OS_Opportunity_is_set
decisions.label: *Rule (OS)* - Opportunity is set

decisions.description: If Recipient is changed and Recipient is not blank and Prior Recipient equal Legal and record type is Legal = execute 'Recipient is changed from Legal' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_RCL_Recepient_is_changed_from_Legal
decisions.label: *Rule (RCL)* - Recepient is changed from Legal

decisions.description: If record is DDQ and Status = Resubmitted - execute 'DDQ Resubmitted' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_RDDQ_DDQ_Resubmitted
decisions.label: *Rule (RDDQ)* - DDQ Resubmitted

decisions.description: If 'Request type' = Extensions request and Status is changed or 'Request Type' = Extensions request and Status is changed and Status does not equal Approved/ Rejected/ Recall - execute 'Status Changed' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_SC_Status_Changed
decisions.label: *Rule (SC)* - Status Changed

rules.name: Status_Changed_Detailed
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2) OR (3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7)
rules.label: Status Changed - detailed

decisions.description: If record is new or Status is changed and Status Completed or Cancelled
decisions.name: Rule_SCCC_Status_Changed_to_Completed_Cancelled
decisions.label: *Rule (SCCC)* - Status Changed to Completed/Cancelled

decisions.description: If Status = Pending Requestor and record type is DDQ - execute 'Supplier Sent to Customer' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_SSC_Supplier_Sent_to_Customer
decisions.label: *Rule (SSC)* - Supplier Sent to Customer

decisions.description: If record is new or Owner Id is changed - execute 'SYS Owner Manager Email' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_SYSE_Update_SYS_Owner_Manager_Email
decisions.label: *Rule (SYSE)* - Update SYS Owner Manager Email

decisions.description: If record is new or Did we try to send the SW template is changed and record type is DDQ and Did we try to send the SW template = Yes, the client had accepted it - execute 'SW Template = Yes, the client had accepted it'
decisions.name: Rule_TA_SW_Template_Yes_the_client_had_accepted_it
decisions.label: *Rule (TA)* - SW Template = Yes, the client had accepted it

rules.name: SW_Template_Yes_the_client_had_accepted_it

rightValue.stringValue: Yes, the client had accepted it

rules.label: SW Template = Yes, the client had accepted it

decisions.description: MIS-4963 - Threshold Logic If record type is DDQ and record is new - execute 'New DDQ' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_TNDDQ_Threshold_OR_New_DDQ
decisions.label: *Rule (TNDDQ)* - Threshold OR New DDQ

rules.name: TNDDQ_DDQ_Under_Threshold_with_Reason
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND ((3 AND 4 AND 9) OR 5)) AND ((6 AND NOT 7) OR (7 AND 8))
rules.label: TNDDQ - DDQ Under Threshold with Reason

decisions.description: MIS-5317 - Update logic to run on Opp ARR and 'Type of paper' MIS-4963 - Threshold Logic If record is new and record type is Legal - execute 'New Legal Request' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_TNLR_Threshold_OR_New_Legal_Request
decisions.label: *Rule (TNLR)* - Threshold OR New Legal Request

rules.name: TNLR_Legal_Under_Threshold
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 3 AND (4 OR (NOT (2) AND 9))) AND ((2 AND NOT (6) AND (5 OR (11 AND 12))) OR (2 AND 6 AND (7 OR (11 AND 12))) OR (NOT (2) AND (8 OR (10 AND 12))))
rules.label: TNLR - Legal Under Threshold

decisions.description: If record is new or Did we try to send the SW template is changed and record type is DDQ and Did we try to send the SW template = Yes, pending client review - execute 'SW Template = Yes, pending client review' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_TPC_SW_Template_Yes_pending_client_review
decisions.label: *Rule (TPC)* - SW Template = Yes, pending client review

rules.name: SW_Template_Yes_pending_client_review
rules.label: SW Template = Yes, pending client review

rules.name: Send
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR (2 AND 3)) AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 8 AND 9
rules.label: Send

Flow.description: MIS-8242 Requester fields should NOT update by the Recipient change MIS-7996 AS request routing update -> RecepientName MIS-7372 - Advisory Services Routing MIS-7248 - Update recipients for Advisory Services MIS-6886 - New Record Type - Search Intelligence Deal Support MIS-5847 - Updated logic to check the highest between Quote and Opp for Legal Request MIS-5317 - Update logic to run on Opp ARR and 'Type of paper' MIS-5318 - Added Data Escalation record type MIS - 5291 recipient manager email Last - MIS-4963 - DDQ/Legal Threshold Logic MIS-4680 - Send alert to inactive users as well MIS-3657 - Add Status Change Counter MIS-3051 (*Rule (TPC)* - SW Template = Yes, pending client review) added Status Change TimeStamp population MIS-3015 MIS-1639 - populate requester email for ddq Excluded 'Managers (M)' Excluded 'Solution Consultants (Queue)' Added 'Send_Alert' decision MIS-8500 Update AS recipient routing

formulas.description: Account Billing Address for Legal request
formulas.name: fr_AccountBillingAddress
formulas.expression: IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Account__c} ) ) , "Country: "& {!$Record.Account__r.BillingCountry} & BR()& "State: "&{!$Record.Account__r.BillingState} & BR() & "City: "& {!$Record.Account__r.BillingCity} & BR() & "Street: "& {!$Record.Account__r.BillingStreet} & BR()& "Zip/Postal code: "& {!$Record.Account__r.BillingPostalCode},"")

formulas.description: Recipient Email for new quote request
formulas.name: fr_Recipient_Email

formulas.description: takes the current value and add 1
formulas.name: fr_Status_Change_Counter_plus_one
RecepientName
formulas.expression: IF( {!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Advisory_Services_Request', IF( OR( CONTAINS({!$Record.Account__r.Owner.Division}, "NA"), CONTAINS({!$Record.Account__r.Owner.Division}, "LATAM"), CONTAINS({!$Record.Account__r.Owner.Division}, "Reseller - Brazil - Alpha"), CONTAINS({!$Record.Account__r.Owner.Division}, "Reseller - Brazil - 108") ), "Ben parkes", IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.Account__r.Owner.Division}, "Agencies Strategic"), "Nicolas Bureau", IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.Account__r.Owner.Division}, "Investors"), "Gavin Davidson", IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.Account__r.Owner.Division}, "OEM"), "Aaron Wong", "Varvara Blazhko" ) ) ) ), IF( FIND("(", TEXT({!$Record.Recipient_Picklist__c}))!=0, LEFT(TEXT({!$Record.Recipient_Picklist__c}), FIND("(", TEXT({!$Record.Recipient_Picklist__c}))-2), TEXT({!$Record.Recipient_Picklist__c}) ) )

Flow.label: Request - Record Triggered Flow - Before Save

recordLookups.name: NBF_Get_Current_User_Manager_Email
recordLookups.label: NBF - Get Current User Manager Email

recordLookups.name: NDDQ_Get_Current_User_Manager_Email
recordLookups.label: NDDQ - Get Current User Manager Email

recordLookups.name: NQR_Get_Current_User_Manager_Email
recordLookups.label: NQR - Get Current User Manager Email

recordLookups.name: TNDDQ_Threshold_Get_Current_User_Manager_Email
recordLookups.label: TNDDQ - Threshold Get Current User Manager Email

recordUpdates.description: MIS-4963 Update Recipient & Requester and Owner Id David Kaplansky = 005b0000003opkrAAA
recordUpdates.name: ABDL_DDQ_Update_Recipient
recordUpdates.label: ABDL DDQ- Update Recipient

recordUpdates.name: Changed_recipient_to_legal_and_populate_Recipient_Email
recordUpdates.label: Changed recipient to legal and populate Recipient Email

recordUpdates.description: Assign Requester / Requester manager email / Requester email on Billing Forms
recordUpdates.name: NBF_Assign_Requester_on_Billing_Forms
recordUpdates.label: NBF - Assign Requester on Billing Forms

recordUpdates.description: Update Recipient & Requester and Owner Id David Kaplansky = 005b0000003opkrAAA
recordUpdates.name: NDDQ_Recipient_Requester
recordUpdates.label: NDDQ - Recipient & Requester

recordUpdates.description: Populate request fields ( Account Billing Address/ Opp type / Owner Id / Recipient email / Recipient picklist / Renewal date / Requester email
recordUpdates.name: NLR_Populate_request_s_fields
recordUpdates.label: NLR - Populate request's fields

recordUpdates.name: SYSE_Update_SYS_Owner_Manager_Email
recordUpdates.label: SYSE - Update SYS Owner Manager Email

recordUpdates.name: TA_Update_Request_Status_to_Completed
recordUpdates.label: TA - Update Request Status to Completed

recordUpdates.description: Update Recipient & Requester and Owner Id Omer Pizem = 0056700000CCrEsAAL
recordUpdates.name: TNDDQ_Threshold_Recipient_Requester_Status
recordUpdates.label: TNDDQ - Threshold Recipient, Requester & Status

recordUpdates.description: Populate request fields ( Account Billing Address/ Opp type / Owner Id / Recipient email / Recipient picklist / Renewal date / Requester email
recordUpdates.name: TNLR_Populate_request_s_fields
recordUpdates.label: TNLR - Populate request's fields

recordUpdates.name: TPC_Update_Request_Status_to_Pending_Client
recordUpdates.label: TPC - Update Request Status to Pending Client

recordUpdates.name: Update_onboarding_complete_date_to_today
recordUpdates.label: Update onboarding complete date to today

recordUpdates.name: Update_onboarding_start_date
recordUpdates.label: Update onboarding start date to today
